proxy_counter_offer.message: Proxy proposals are selected by an LLM proxy agent from algorithmically generated Pareto candidates and checked by an algorithmic validator.

trace.decision: The final decision is the prediction of the group with the highest reliability.
trace.reason: Low Risk wins because its group has the highest weighted reliability under the current criteria.
trace.reliability: Each predicted-class group receives reliability from its averaged criteria profile.
trace.weights: User preference is expressed as a five-criterion offer; proxy stakeholder can respond with a counter-offer.

shap_patterns.note: Feature patterns are averaged by predicted class; criteria correlations are computed across all selected models for this case.
